tools.name: notes_wikilink_find_backlinks
tools.description: Find all notes that contain a wikilink to a given note name. Returns file paths and matching lines.

note_name.description: Note name to search for backlinks to (e.g. 'Conventions', 'AI Assistant')

scope.description: Directory path relative to the sandbox root to narrow the search (use ./ prefix). Omit to search all notes.

tools.name: notes_wikilink_find_outlinks
tools.description: Extract all wikilink targets from a note. Returns one link target per line (note names only, without brackets).

path.description: Note path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix)

scope.description: Path to the directory relative to the sandbox root (e.g. 'my-notes'). Omit when the notes is at the sandbox root.

tools.name: notes_wikilink_find_by_tag
tools.description: Find notes that contain a given tag in their content or frontmatter.

scope.description: Directory path relative to the sandbox root to narrow the search (use ./ prefix). Omit to search all notes.

tools.name: notes_wikilink_find_broken
tools.description: Check a note for broken wikilinks. Returns a list of link targets that do not resolve to existing notes.

path.description: Note path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix)

scope.description: Path to the directory relative to the sandbox root (e.g. 'my-notes'). Omit when the notes is at the sandbox root.

tools.name: notes_wikilink_rename
tools.description: Rename a note and update all wikilinks that reference it. Both plain links ([[Old Name]]) and aliased links ([[Old Name|alias]]) are updated across all notes.

from.description: Current note path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix)

to.description: New note path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix)

scope.description: Path to the directory relative to the sandbox root (e.g. 'my-notes'). Omit when the notes is at the sandbox root.
